data.title: 国际服主线Vol.2更新青辉石礼物
data.summary: [Main Story Update Celebration Special Gift] Sensei, Schale prepared a special Clockwork Flower Pava
data.body:
[Main Story Update Celebration Special Gift]

Sensei, Schale prepared a special Clockwork Flower Pavane update celebration gift!
Please check your mailbox for your gift of Pyroxene x1,200!
(Available until 12/21/2021 14:59 (UTC))

https://nexon.link/9my
#BlueArchive
